name: Coordinator Delegates to Researcher
description: Fires when a coordinator loop calls decide(action=delegate_research). The decide tool (processor/agentic-tools/decide.go) writes a `coordinator.next_action` triple on the coordinator loop's entity; this rule matches on that triple and spawns a researcher loop. See upstream semstreams docs/advanced/12-coordinator-pattern.md for the pattern, and configs/rules/deep-research/03-fan-out-subtopics.json for a sibling rule that invert-matches the same triple mechanism.

on_enter.subject: agent.task.research
on_enter.prompt: A coordinator delegated a research task to you (parent loop $entity.id). Call read_loop_result with loop_id=$entity.id to fetch the user's original question, then use web_search to investigate and produce a concise synthesis. Call submit_work with your final answer.
